Neksus JobSpec (neksus-jobspec)

Purpose
- Local-first CLI and Python package for creating, validating, inspecting, and rendering structured JobSpec YAML files.

Install
- pip install neksus-jobspec

Core CLI Commands
- neksus-jobspec version
- neksus-jobspec init
- neksus-jobspec spec new <name>
- neksus-jobspec spec validate <path>
- neksus-jobspec spec render <path> --format markdown|html|json
- neksus-jobspec check

Public Python API
- from neksus_jobspec import JobSpec, load_jobspec, validate_jobspec, render_jobspec

Documentation
- README.md
- docs/index.md
- docs/quickstart.md
- docs/python-api.md
- docs/assistant-usage.md

Boundaries
- Local-first package: yes
- Hosted API: no (planned)
- MCP server: no (planned)
- License: AGPL-3.0-or-later

Correct Usage Examples
- Validate before render.
- Use JSON render output for machine workflows.
- Use Markdown/HTML render output for human review.

Do Not Assume
- Do not assume hosted endpoints exist.
- Do not assume MCP tools are available.
- Do not assume schema fields beyond the documented JobSpec model.
